text:

- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.4-RELEASE, 11.4-STABLE, 12.2-RELEASE, 12.2-STABLE, 13.0-RELEASE, 13.0-STABLE, 14.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
